summary: Phase 2 Frontend Testing: CRITICAL ISSUE - Dashboard completely blank. Backend timesheet APIs working correctly (27/29 tests passed). Frontend dashboard not rendering any content - only sidebar visible. Issue affects ALL dashboard widgets, not just new timesheet widget.

minor_issues.issue: Test expects different data format than API returns
minor_issues.impact: Test validation issue only - API works correctly

details: ✅ Timesheet Update Allowed Check - Returns correct day restriction (Tuesday blocked)
✅ Auto-fill Timesheets - Works (returned 0 entries as expected - Don has no active allocations)
✅ Get My Week Timesheets - Works (returns empty list as expected)
✅ Update Timesheet - Skipped (no timesheets to update - expected behavior)
✅ Submit Week Timesheets - Correctly blocked due to day restriction (not Thursday/Friday)

critical_bugs.issue: ENTIRE dashboard not rendering - completely blank page (only sidebar visible)
symptoms: React root has 12,330 characters but no expected content
Frontend compiled successfully with no errors
investigation_notes: Issue is NOT specific to timesheet widget - affects entire dashboard
Dashboard component loads but doesn't render expected content
No API errors detected in backend logs
No JavaScript/React errors in browser console
Syntax validation passed for Dashboard.js and TimesheetWeeklyCheckin.js
Main agent's original code had correct indentation
Testing agent fixed indentation issues but problem persists
possible_causes: Data query failing silently causing component to not render
Conditional rendering logic preventing content display

success_percentage.frontend: 0% (dashboard completely broken - cannot test any features)

items.description: ENTIRE Dashboard page is blank - only sidebar visible. This is NOT a timesheet widget issue - ALL dashboard content is missing (KPI cards, project portfolio, resource matrix, check-in widgets, etc.)
investigation_done: Verified backend APIs all working (27/29 tests passed)
Verified frontend compiles with no errors
Verified no JavaScript/React errors in browser console
Verified syntax of Dashboard.js and TimesheetWeeklyCheckin.js
Confirmed React root has content (12,330 chars) but not expected dashboard content
next_steps: Check if Dashboard component has conditional rendering that's preventing display
Verify all React Query hooks are working correctly (userData, capacityData, resources, projects, allocations)
Check if any query is failing silently
Verify TooltipProvider and other wrapper components are working
Test Dashboard on a clean browser session
Check if issue exists in other pages or just Dashboard
Consider adding error boundaries to catch silent errors
Add console.log statements to track component rendering
